Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Genuineness Of Documents And Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants Burney And Draggs And Or Their Attorneys Of Record In The Amount Of $1,487.50; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Tanya Gomerman In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Apr-09-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. TANYA GOMERMAN, Esq. of Law Offices of Tanya Gomerman (Tel: 415-545-8608) for plaintiff Roderick Navarrette;
Atty. BRIAN C. JOHNSON, Esq. of Tyson & Mendes LLP (Tel: 628-253-5070) for defendants Evans Brothers, Inc., Ruben Burney, and Linda Daggs.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF RODERICK NAVARRETTE's Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Genuineness Of Documents And Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants Burney And Draggs And Or Their Attorneys Of Record In The Amount Of $1,487.50.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and counsel for both sides authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Moving party to submit a proposed order in Word format to the Judge Pro Tem (cc'ing opposing counsel) by 5 p.m. today.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Krishanna DeRita,
CSR No. 11945, Tel: 925.360.6891, Email: krishkurt@aol.com (302/JPT)
